title: monanthos corticicola
side_effects: Monanthos corticicola can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its potent bioactive compounds. Prolonged exposure to its extracts can also cause cardiovascular problems, such as increased heart rate and blood pressure. In severe cases, improper use of Monanthos corticicola can lead to liver damage and kidney failure, highlighting the need for careful handling and dosage. Additionally, its improper use may cause allergic reactions, including skin irritation and respiratory distress.
